title: About Me
text:
Hobbies
I am a super crafty person! My grandma taught me to sew and crochet at a young age, and I never stopped.
coloring, baking, and
Favorite things
I love cats, gingham, the color pink,
Goals
Travels
photo
Last summer, I was fortunate to have the opportunity to study abroad in Barcelona, Spain. I tested my high school Spanish language proficiency and took classes in Spanish during the week, then explored the region on the weekends. I especially enjoyed a trip to Venice, Italy, where I then took the train to Lake Garda.
I also recently traveled to Portland, Oregon and witnessed the beauty of their spring bloom.

title: Things I’ve made
text:
In my opinion, there’s no better feeling than holding something I’ve made with my own hands.
Baking
insert photo
This past year I’ve been experimenting with yeast! I baked my first loaf of bread and tested out cinnamon rolls and cardamom buns.
sewing
crochet

title: Stella Symonds
text: Hi! My name is Stella Symonds and I am in my third year at UCSB pursuing a B.S. in Environmental Studies with a concentration in Statistics.
